final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum infographic for Chinese ethnic minority costume, designed as a National Museum exhibition panel.

Style/medium: museum exhibition infographic, archival illustration style with photorealistic costume rendering, matte paper texture background, editorial design in the spirit of Metropolitan Museum costume catalogs
Composition: centered full-body figure wearing traditional ethnic minority costume, surrounded by structured annotation zones with Chinese callout lines pointing to specific garment parts
Subject: Yi ethnic group traditional women's costume (彝族服饰) — embroidered pleated skirt, silver headdress, cross-stitch vest, woolen cape, and layered accessories
Scene/backdrop: warm off-white paper texture (米白/绢纸白), subtle tea-stained edges, clean negative space around the figure, no decorative frames
Lighting/mood: soft even diffused museum lighting, neutral color temperature, scholarly and restrained atmosphere
Color palette: earth tones as base (ochre, terracotta, indigo), silver accents from jewelry, vibrant embroidery threads as punctuating colors
Materials/textures: hand-woven wool texture, natural indigo-dyed cotton, hammered silver ornament surfaces, cross-stitch embroidery thread patterns
Text (verbatim): "中国少数民族服饰图鉴" "彝族传统女装" "结构拆解" "材质工艺" "纹样寓意"
Constraints: all text must be simplified Chinese characters; layout must include top title zone, left structural breakdown with callout lines, upper-right material texture samples, middle-right color palette and pattern meanings, bottom wearing sequence diagram; maintain professional museum archival quality
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio photography look, e-commerce product page style, anime illustration, cosplay vibe, decorative clutter, illegible text, incorrect structural labels, fake material textures, gradient backgrounds, drop shadows, 8K stuffer words
